seoTitle: How to Enable Atlassian Intelligence in Trello
metaDescription: Turn on Atlassian Intelligence in your Trello Workspace to unlock AI writing assistance, summarizers, and smart checklist generation.
intro: Atlassian Intelligence brings AI writing help, summarization, and smart checklist generation into Trello, but it has to be turned on by a workspace admin first. This guide walks through activating it and using it on your cards afterward.

steps.heading: Confirm your admin access
steps.body: Only Workspace Admins can toggle Atlassian Intelligence on, so check your permission level before starting.

steps.heading: Open Workspace Settings
steps.body: Select your Premium or Enterprise workspace in the sidebar and click Workspace Settings.

steps.heading: Find the AI settings category
steps.body: Scan the settings dashboard for the Atlassian Intelligence or AI category.

steps.heading: Review and accept the terms
steps.body: Read through the privacy and data security terms, then check the agreement box to authorize the feature.

steps.heading: Turn on the toggle
steps.body: Flip the main slider from Deactivated to Active and watch for a confirmation banner at the top of the page.

steps.heading: Try the AI tool on a card
steps.body: Open a task card, locate the new AI button, and test it with a simple summary or writing prompt.

faq.question: Does everyone on my team need to enable this separately?
faq.answer: No, once a Workspace Admin turns it on, the AI tools become available to the whole team on that workspace.

faq.question: What subscription do I need for Atlassian Intelligence?
faq.answer: It's available with Premium or Enterprise subscription tiers on your Trello workspace.

faq.question: What can Atlassian Intelligence do inside Trello?
faq.answer: It includes tools like inline text generation, text condensing, and smart action item capture within card comments.

faq.question: How do team members know the feature is live?
faq.answer: Workspace members typically receive a UI notification badge once the feature has been successfully activated.
